market_overview.headline: Market structure remains fragmented with both SPY and QQQ in bearish (unstacked) patterns while BTC shows bear rally potential.
market_overview.detail: 36% of stocks maintain Full Bull status but 30% remain in Full Bear, indicating broad divergence. Finance and Technology services sectors deeply oversold while Energy minerals shows 100% bullish participation.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum Surge
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology stocks dominating momentum with storage and semiconductor names accelerating. Memory/storage revival theme gaining traction with strong analyst support.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals Leading, Finance/Tech Services Lagging

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with all 14 names in Full Bull status
Small but unanimous bullish participation across telecom names
Strong showing with most names maintaining uptrends despite some pullbacks

weakest.note: Banking and financial services deeply oversold with 80% bearish participation
Software and cloud names under severe pressure with 82% bearish signals
Auto and durable goods showing complete breakdown with no bullish names

sector_analysis.detail: Clear flight to quality materials/energy while growth sectors face continued distribution. Traditional defensive rotation underway.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ in unstacked bearish patterns reducing pullback conviction
Finance sector showing 80% bearish participation with major banks under pressure
Technology services breakdown accelerating with 82% bearish signals including MSFT, META weakness
13 Bull Breakdown signals indicate established uptrends starting to crack
